title: THREE REPUBLICANS KILLED OBAMACARE REPEAL — 49 TO 51
title_alt: ONE SENATE NIGHT. ONE THUMB. OBAMACARE LIVED.
BROKEN: Skinny Repeal Failed 49–51 — Obamacare | SEALED
description:
Seven years of repeal-and-replace chants — and one Senate night in 2017 decided whether Obamacare actually died. Forty-nine yes votes. Not enough.

July 28, 2017 — Senate skinny repeal failed 49–51. McCain, Collins, Murkowski voted no. No replacement bill ever cleared the Senate. Book grades it BROKEN.

Full 145-promise audit: https://sealed2016.com?utm_source=youtube&utm_medium=shorts&utm_campaign=obamacare-repeal
